message:
fix(core,search,guard): tighten project identity matching and expiry parsing

Rename matches() to exact_matches() to enforce strict slug/key pairing
without fuzzy token fallback; improve placeholder reconciliation with
per-token count tracking; add numeric microsecond timestamp fallback in
is_expired() for string-wrapped timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
